meta.project: SIGP - Sistema Integral de Gestión de Proyectos

product_overview: SIGP is a web-based project and activity management system that supports Scrum (projects) and Kanban (activities), strategic planning (PGD), document workflows and role-based access control for government IT management.
core_goals: Provide end-to-end management for projects (Scrum) and activities (Kanban) including backlog, sprints, tasks and subtasks.
Support strategic planning (PGD) with hierarchical objectives (OEI, OGD, OEGD, AE) and traceability to operational work.
Offer role-based access control (7 roles) so UI and actions are restricted per permissions matrix.
Enable document management and approval workflows (actas, project documents) with secure file upload.
Deliver real-time notifications and board updates (WebSocket) and an executive dashboard with KPIs and drill-downs.
Manage human resources, assignments and availability to support planning and capacity.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with username/password, manage JWT session and redirect to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Redirect to /dashboard on success -> See project metrics cards
Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Main Dashboard
features.description: Show global KPIs, project/activities overview, charts and quick navigation to detailed dashboards.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View project metrics cards -> View activity metrics -> Click on project card to navigate -> Navigate to /dashboard/proyecto/[id] -> View project dashboard details
Navigate to /dashboard without authentication -> Get redirected to /unauthorized -> See access denied message

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Real-time grouped notifications with filters, mark-as-read and navigation to the relevant context.
user_flows: Navigate to /notificaciones -> View notifications list -> Filter by type -> Click notification related to project -> Navigate to /poi/proyectos/[id] -> See project details
Navigate to /notificaciones -> Mark notification as read -> API returns error (network/backend) -> See error message and notification remains unread

features.name: Strategic Planning PGD
features.description: Manage 4-year Plan de Gobierno Digital and its hierarchy of OEI, OGD, OEGD and Acciones Estratégicas, with progress tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /pgd -> View active PGD plan -> Click Create OEI -> Fill OEI form (code, name, indicator, metas) -> Submit form -> See new OEI listed under /pgd/oei
Navigate to /pgd -> Click Create OEI -> Submit form with missing required fields -> See validation error about required fields

features.name: Projects Management (Scrum)
features.description: Full Scrum lifecycle: create projects, epics, sprints, user stories and tasks; manage sprint execution, burndown and reports.
user_flows: Navigate to /poi/proyectos -> View projects list with status filters -> Click Create new Scrum project -> Fill project form and assign Scrum Master -> Click Create -> See project listed in /poi/proyectos -> Click project card to open /poi/proyectos/[id]

Navigate to /poi/proyectos/[id] -> Open Sprints tab -> Click Create sprint with start and end dates -> Submit sprint -> If dates overlap existing sprint -> See validation error about overlapping sprints

features.name: Subprojects Management
features.description: Create and manage subprojects linked to parent projects with their own backlog, sprints and schedule.
user_flows: Navigate to /poi/proyectos/[id] -> Click Create subproject -> Fill subproject details -> Submit -> See new subproject listed -> Click subproject to navigate to /poi/subproyectos/[id]
Navigate to /poi/subproyectos/[id] -> Attempt to delete subproject that has dependent sprints or artifacts -> See error message preventing deletion due to dependencies

features.name: Activities Management (Kanban)
features.description: Manage continuous-flow activities: create activities, tasks and subtasks, drag & drop on Kanban board with real-time updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /poi/actividad/lista -> Click Create new Kanban activity -> Fill activity form and assign Coordinator -> Submit -> Navigate to /poi/actividad/tablero -> Create task in activity -> Drag task to different column -> See task status updated
Navigate to /poi/actividad/tablero -> Drag task to different column -> WebSocket backend unavailable -> See error indicating realtime update failed and task reverts or shows conflict

features.name: Subactivities Management
features.description: Manage subactivities and their tasks inside an activity, including creation, status updates and finalization.
user_flows: Navigate to /poi/actividad/detalles -> View subactivities list -> Click Create subactivity -> Fill subactivity form -> Submit -> Create task within subactivity -> Update subactivity task status -> Finalize subactivity
Navigate to /poi/actividad/detalles -> Create task within subactivity -> Attempt to finalize subactivity without required evidence -> See validation error about missing evidence

features.name: Human Resources Management
features.description: List personnel, search by name, view profiles, availability and manage divisions and assignments.
user_flows: Navigate to /recursos-humanos -> View personnel list -> Use search input to search personnel by name -> Click personnel entry -> See personnel profile and availability
Navigate to /recursos-humanos -> Use search input to search unknown name -> See 'no results' message

features.name: Documents and Minutes (Actas)
features.description: Upload project documents and generate/approve meeting or constitution minutes through a multi-step workflow with PDF generation.
user_flows: Navigate to /poi/proyectos/[id] -> Open Documents or Actas tab -> Click Upload project document -> Select file (pdf/docx/xlsx) -> Click Upload -> See document in project documents list -> PMO clicks Approve -> See document state 'Aprobado'
Navigate to /poi/proyectos/[id] -> Click Upload project document -> Select file with disallowed format -> Click Upload -> See validation error about permitted file types

features.name: Permission Based Access Control (RBAC)
features.description: Render UI and control actions according to the user's role (Admin, PMO, Coordinador, Scrum Master, Patrocinador, Desarrollador, Implementador).
user_flows: Login as PMO -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See menu items for PGD, POI, Dashboard, Notificaciones, RRHH -> Click PGD and access /pgd
Login as DESARROLLADOR -> Attempt to navigate to /pgd -> See /unauthorized page or access denied message

features.name: Permission Based Access Control
features.description: Role based UI rendering - 7 roles with different module access
user_interactions: ADMIN sees only RRHH and administration modules
PMO sees PGD, POI, Dashboard, Notificaciones, RRHH
COORDINADOR sees POI, Dashboard, Notificaciones, RRHH (read)
SCRUM_MASTER sees POI (no create), Notificaciones, RRHH (read)

known_limitations.issue: Dev server running - tests limited to 15 high priority tests
known_limitations.impact: Concurrent test load may cause server instability

known_limitations.issue: Scrum tasks (tipo SCRUM) cannot have subtasks by design
known_limitations.impact: Subtasks only available for Kanban tasks

known_limitations.issue: Real-time features require backend Socket.io server
known_limitations.impact: Notifications and board updates depend on backend availability

known_limitations.issue: File uploads require presigned URLs from MinIO backend
known_limitations.impact: Document upload requires backend MinIO service running
